subject: kernel: kexec_file: fix error return code of kexec_calculate_store_digests()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. features.json/seed.c reused from err-5-rep2 shared POC-side artifacts. POC regenerated once to match seed's structural counts (verifier-v1 passed: F1.acq=3 F1.rel=6 F3.goto=11 F5.ret=4 F2.if=18). Only isErrReturnFunction kept as the single predicate; the P2 (failure-branch goto in an if-then) and P3 (err-still-zero at goto) logic from the C3 3-predicate plan is inlined verbatim in the final assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles on first try; fires on kexec_calculate_store_digests_buggy (poc.c:69,82) and also on the sibling FP helper kexec_helper_sibling_fp (poc.c:166). L0 accepts on compile-success regardless of oracle pattern (per L0-prompt.md §2: 'accept ANY successful compile as the L0 output').
